works.title: Gnossienne No. 1 — Erik Satie
works.oneliner: A sparse piano line with transparent rhythm and breathing room for score-follow and cue sync.
works.description: A minimalist piano texture that keeps notation readable while exposing page-follow and audio sync behavior.

works.title: Lo, How a Rose — Michael Praetorius
works.oneliner: A transparent chorale texture that is ideal for verifying score-follow timing and clean playback transitions.
works.description: Praetorius material is included as a second stock piece so playground behavior mirrors real generated output workflows.
